$description: Legendary Smith — glm-hammer landing page + README reskin. Mythic nordic smithy: warm forge dominant, cold snow as the journey-frame accent. Mined from the crucible prospect receipts at .glm-hammer/evidence/design/prospect/.

color.$description: Palette mined by color-prospector from 5 real-world references (Zorn palette, forge photography, Falu red + stave-church tar, cyanotype blueprint, medieval illuminator). Warm-forge dominant; cold reserved for the journey/correction accent.

default.$description: Forge floor — warm tarred-black (stave-church pine-tar, color-prospector ref C3). The single light-source base; fire rakes across it from below.

raised.$description: Card/panel surface — warm charcoal-brown, one step lifted (Zorn ivory-black + yellow-ochre mix, ref C1/C2).

sunken.$description: Code/pre block — deeper forge shadow, derived one step below default.

ember.$description: Active/forge-hot panel tint — molten under-glow at the hottest cards (forge falloff, ref C2).

parchment.$description: Light surface — yellowed parchment (lead-white + glair, ref C5). Used for blueprint/code contrast panels; ink text #1a1a1a applied inline per Application Guide (this token is the canvas, not a default-background gate target).

default.$description: Parchment-on-forge body text. Contrast 14.8:1 on surface.default (WCAG AAA). Carbon-black-on-parchment from ref C5, inverted for the dark forge theme.

muted.$description: Ash-grey secondary text — weathered-stone mid (ref C5 earth-brown family). Contrast 5.5:1 on surface.default.

subtle.$description: Caption/meta text — deeper patina. Contrast 3.5:1 on surface.default (subtle tier).

ember.$description: Ember-bright heading accent — hot-orange highlight at or above the molten floor (ref C2 hot-orange, capped at #FF8E57 per neon-guard). Contrast 8.1:1 — safe even for large body.

default.$description: Molten orange — primary warm accent (CTA, active state). Forge falloff mid, ref C2. Contrast 5.9:1 on surface.default.

strong.$description: Bright ember — hover/pressed warm accent. Ember-red family lifted from #A6341D to clear the 3.0:1 accent gate (ref C2, brightened). Contrast 3.5:1.

cold.$description: Iron-cyan patina — the COLD journey-frame / apprentice-correction accent, used sparingly (≤5% pixel area, ref C4). The deep Prussian #003153 is reserved for borders (fails contrast as a fill on dark); this lighter patina is the only cold fill. Contrast 7.0:1.

gold.$description: Gold-leaf gilding — the legendary-sigil detail only, ultra-sparing, never a fill (ref C5). Contrast 7.4:1.

default.$description: Warm ink-line border on dark surfaces — hammered-edge feel (carbon-black + umber, ref C5). Hairline structural rule.

ember.$description: Ember-red border — the deep forge-falloff red (ref C2). Reserved for borders only; fails contrast as text/accent on dark.

cold.$description: Prussian-blue cold border — cyanotype blueprint rule (ref C4). Reserved for borders; too dark to pass as an accent fill on the forge floor.

ok.$description: Forge-green — verdict PASS / validated / trusted result (Z535 safety-green via layout-prospector ref L4).

no.$description: Forge-red — verdict FAIL / REJECT / correction (Z535 danger, softened from raw red).

typography.$description: Three-voice system mined by type-prospector: Cinzel display (smith), Newsreader body (saga prose), IBM Plex Mono (blueprint drafting). Curated progressive scale (12/14/16/18/20/26/40/52/72px — tight steps for body, wider leaps for display); positive tracking on display + uppercase labels.

display.$description: Smith voice — weighty, hand-cut, inscriptional (ref T1 Cinzel). Korean fallback to Pretendard; smithy cadence survives via weight × tracking × all-caps, never via a Korean fraktur (anti-ref).

body.$description: Saga-prose + drafting voice — humanist serif tuned for screen, generous x-height, never thin (ref T3 Newsreader).

mono.$description: Blueprint/drafting voice — even-spaced, +0.32px label tracking stolen from Carbon (ref T2). D2Coding keeps 한글 fixed-width for blueprint-grid alignment.

caption.$description: 12px — mono labels, step counters, card sub-labels.

display.$description: Cinzel headlines — carved-breath positive tracking (ref T1).

label.$description: Uppercase mono labels — drafting-plate tracking (ref T2).

mono.$description: Body mono — loose for blueprint grid.

spacing.$description: 4px baseline / 8px layout split (Queensland Govt + Material, via layout-prospector ref L1). 10 named tokens from pip-inset to monumental negative space.

4xl.$description: Monumental hero negative space — the 'snow' earned around the anvil.

radius.$description: Sharp-first scale (layout-prospector ref L1/L4): radius is earned, never default. Panels drop to 4px; only status-signal pills stay round.

none.$description: Blueprints, ruled panels, tables, code blocks, the drawing frame.

pill.$description: Status pips & state pills ONLY — Z535 signal-state logic (ref L4), not decoration.

motion.$description: Three registers (motion-prospector): steady hammer-rhythm base, ember-flicker warm ambience, snowfall-drift cold frame only. Trusted results hold STILL.

instant.$description: State-pill toggle, link color, the apprentice's re-check flash (ref M1 Carbon fast-01).

quick.$description: Hover/press feedback — settles, no overshoot (ref M1 fast-02).

standard.$description: Small reveals — card content swap, status change (ref M1 moderate-02).

deliberate.$description: Large/section reveals — hero settle, flow-diagram draw (ref M1 slow-01).

weighty.$description: The single heaviest move — hero hammer-strike settle / first paint anchor (ref M1 slow-02).

hammerWeight.$description: Default productive curve — Carbon productive, weighted never bouncy (ref M1).

settle.$description: Emphasized decelerate — element brakes hard like a hammer landing (ref M2 M3 emphasized-decelerate).

emberFlicker.$description: Symmetric ease-in-out — the flicker breathes in and out (ref M4).

snowfallDrift.$description: Linear — the ONLY linear easing; snow drifts at constant rate, never eases (ref M3).
